base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of simon_whip_level_2_full_strip — a character from 1986 castlevania. Chain whip (level 2, mid-upgrade) — longer reach, different segment graphic. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Chain whip (level 2, mid-upgrade) — longer reach, different segment graphic; 4-stance × 3-frame same structure as level 1. Acquired via chain-whip powerup pickup
